entry.data:
MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
A SLIGHT CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS THIS MORNING, THEN A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS THIS AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE MID 70S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING
LOWS IN THE MID 60S
SOUTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
BREEZY WITH HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
SOUTH WINDS 15 TO 25 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 35 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING
SHOWERS LIKELY
LOWS IN THE MID 60S
SOUTH WINDS 15 TO 20 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 30 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

SHOWERS LIKELY
A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
SOUTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 25 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE EVENING, THEN SHOWERS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS AROUND 60
CHANCE OF RAIN 80 PERCENT

SHOWERS
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S
TEMPERATURE FALLING INTO THE LOWER 60S IN THE AFTERNOON
CHANCE OF RAIN 90 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE EVENING, THEN PARTLY CLOUDY AFTER MIDNIGHT
MUCH COOLER WITH LOWS AROUND 40
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLEAR
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 50S
LOWS IN THE MID 30S

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 40S
